expectations.text: The agent uses the --list flag with the filter 'dc_quote'
expectations.evidence: Without-skill response suggests `pac webresource list --name dc_quote*` or a Dataverse Web API query — no knowledge of deploy.py's --list flag

expectations.text: The agent uses 'uv run' to invoke the script
expectations.evidence: Agent does not invoke any local script. It says 'I don't have the ability to connect to a Dynamics 365 environment' and only lists local files

expectations.text: The agent does NOT attempt a deploy
expectations.evidence: Agent correctly does not attempt a deploy — it explains it can't connect to D365 and only shows local files

uncertainties: Cannot query D365 without knowing the specific tool

eval_feedback.overall: The passing assertion (not attempting a deploy) passes for the wrong reason — the agent can't do anything, not because it made the right call. Consider whether this assertion is truly discriminating for the without-skill baseline.
